fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a premium valuation and has thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 18.3% (EPS 0.60 vs 0.51); next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% demonstrate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Forward P/E of 77.37, while high, is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 579.49, indicating expected earnings growth.
Gross margin of 79.9% is very healthy, supporting the company's ability to scale.
Free cash flow of $936.73M indicates robust cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong_buy' with a mean target of $223.93.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 579.49 and Price/Sales of 21.35 indicate a very high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and Profit margin of 3.7% are thin, suggesting potential profitability challenges despite revenue growth.
Return on assets of -0.2% is negative.
Debt/Equity ratio of 32.22 is high, though offset by a strong current ratio of 3.40.

news.paragraph: Datadog is positioned to benefit from the increasing adoption of AI in production environments, according to recent analysis. The company recently surpassed $1 billion in quarterly revenue and raised its 2026 outlook, prompting a price target increase to $255 from BTIG. These positive developments, coupled with a bullish technical signal, suggest strong momentum for DDOG.
